basics.name: Eldar Hasanov
basics.label: Software Engineer
basics.summary: Aspiring software engineer with a strong foundation in computer science, currently pursuing a Bachelor's degree at UC Berkeley. Experienced in software development, blockchain technology, and machine learning research.

work.name: 1PR Brands
highlights: Developed software for music creators to assist with professional, financial, and marketing decisions.
Engineered backend logic in Node.js and Spotify API.
Assisted in the development of React frontend.
Performed in-depth quantitative analysis using various music data APIs.

work.name: Anthems Inc.
highlights: Researched and analyzed the performance of multiple blockchains for dynamic and NFT implementation.
Developed dynamic smart contracts in Solidity and Cadence on ETH, Flow, and Polygon.
Optimized on-chain functions, reducing average transaction fees by 35%.

work.name: Lawrence Space Sciences Laboratory
highlights: Conducted research on interstellar dust using machine learning algorithms.
Improved auto-grader efficiency using PCA and modeling.
Developed new testing software and visualized results for presentation.

courses: CS 170 Efficient Algorithms and Intractable Problems
CS61A Structure and Interpretation of Computer Programs
CS61C Great Ideas of Computer Architecture (Machine Structures)
CS 70 Discrete Mathematics and Probability Theory
DATA C8 Foundations of Data Science
EECS 16A Designing Information Devices and Systems

projects.name: Secure File Sharing System
projects.summary: Developed a fully secure file-sharing system in Go with the ability to detect attacks on a vulnerable database.
highlights: Utilized security concepts such as Symmetric and Asymmetric (RSA) encryptions, MACs, Digital Signatures.

projects.name: ClubHub
projects.summary: Built a full-stack web app allowing UC Berkeley students to browse, subscribe, apply, and rate clubs.
highlights: Developed in a team of 4 during CalHacks 10.0 Hackathon using Typescript, React, and Supabase DB.

projects.name: Build Your Own World
projects.summary: Built a 2D world-generating engine in Java allowing complex interactions, such as the ability to move, load/save mechanism, and enemies following path algorithms.
highlights: Utilized graphs, hash-maps, rendering, and A* algorithm.
